'''yathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadriseriately|quadriseriately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadriseriately|quadriseriately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yathate|yathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yathatesher|yathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathatesherĂ«m|yathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yathatero|yathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yathateshĂ«|yathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathateshĂ«m|yathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyathatero|gokiyathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyathateshĂ«|gokiyathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyathateshĂ«m|gokiyathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyathankerom|goyathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyathankeshĂ«|goyathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyathankeshĂ«m|goyathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyathankeya|goyathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yathaterom|yathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathatemu|yathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yathateya|yathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyathaterom|gokiyathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyathatemu|gokiyathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyathateya|gokiyathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yathathate|yathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yathathatesher|yathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathathatesherĂ«m|yathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yathathatero|yathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yathathateshĂ«|yathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathathateshĂ«m|yathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyathathatero|gokiyathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyathathateshĂ«|gokiyathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyathathateshĂ«m|gokiyathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyathathankerom|goyathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyathathankeshĂ«|goyathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyathathankeshĂ«m|goyathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyathathankeya|goyathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yathathaterom|yathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yathathatemu|yathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yathathateya|yathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyathathaterom|gokiyathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyathathatemu|gokiyathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyathathateya|gokiyathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠte|yĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠtesher|yĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠtero|yĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠthĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠthĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠterom|yĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠtemu|yĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠthĂŠteya|yĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠthĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafthafte|yafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafthaftesher|yafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafthaftesherĂ«m|yafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafthaftero|yafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafthafteshĂ«|yafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafthafteshĂ«m|yafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafthaftero|gokiyafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafthafteshĂ«|gokiyafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafthafteshĂ«m|gokiyafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafthafnkerom|goyafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafthafnkeshĂ«|goyafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafthafnkeshĂ«m|goyafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafthafnkeya|goyafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafthafterom|yafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafthaftemu|yafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafthafteya|yafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafthafterom|gokiyafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafthaftemu|gokiyafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafthafteya|gokiyafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
